hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; if [ ! -f dist/index.html ] || [ -n "$(find src index.html -type f -newer dist/index.html 2>/dev/null | head -1)" ]; then bun run build > /tmp/goose-build.log 2>&1 && echo '✅ Stop hook: bun run build 完成（src 有改动）' || { echo '❌ Stop hook: build 失败，详情：'; tail -25 /tmp/goose-build.log; exit 2; }; fi
